ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "year_of_eligibility" INTEGER /* Year the player is eligible for the draft */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the college (e.g., ACC, SEC, Big 12) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the college */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled at the college */,
  "website" TEXT /* College's official website */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* College's ranking in football */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_college_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in college */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards accumulated by the player in college */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards accumulated by the player in college */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards accumulated by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks made by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles by the player */,
  "fumbles_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles recovered by the player */,
  "punting_yards" INTEGER /* Punting yards accumulated by the player */,
  "kickoff_return_yards" INTEGER /* Kickoff return yards accumulated by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_college_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_college_stats_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the draft */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the draft */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the draft */,
  "number_of_picks" INTEGER /* Total number of picks in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draft */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "pick_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the player was picked */,
  "scouting_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's scouting report */,
  "draft_board_position" TEXT /* Player's position on the draft board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combine_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "forty_yard_dash" REAL /* 40-yard dash time */,
  "vertical_jump" REAL /* Vertical jump height */,
  "bench_reps" INTEGER /* Number of bench reps */,
  "broad_jump" REAL /* Broad jump distance */,
  "three_cone_drill" REAL /* Time for the 3-cone drill */,
  "twenty_yard_shuttle" REAL /* Time for the 20-yard shuttle */,
  "sixty_yard_shuttle" REAL /* Time for the 60-yard shuttle */,
  "shuttle_run" REAL /* Time for the shuttle run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combine_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team (e.g., AFC, NFC) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "team_url" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "primary_position" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the player's primary position */,
  "position_group" TEXT /* Position group (e.g., Offensive Line, Defensive Backs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
